themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Jerome on Commentary on Zechariah: (Chapter III - Verse 1 and following) And he showed me Jes...". Word-study detail reinforces "הַטָּה֜וֹר: a fair - pure (in a physical, chemical, ceremonial or moral sense)".
